injected: pipeline/transform.py: the per-(customer, month) aggregation uses agg(total_revenue=("amount", "mean")) instead of ("amount", "sum") -- averages each group's order amounts instead of totaling them. order_count and the join/grouping logic are untouched.
intended_fix: Change the agg spec back to total_revenue=("amount", "sum").
symptom_fix_to_watch_for: Don't 'fix' this downstream by multiplying total_revenue by order_count to approximate a sum, and don't trust test_known_aggregate_cell alone -- for a group with exactly one order, mean and sum are identical, so that single-order pinned cell passes even with the bug present. Only the overall and per-customer aggregate tests (which include multi-order groups) catch it.
